title: polypodium subrostratum
intro: Polypodium subrostratum, also known as the Rock Cap Fern or Asian Rock-cap, is a species of fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its potential anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral properties, which may help to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Polypodium subrostratum have been linked to several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of dried leaves or extracts, which can be taken as a supplement or used in traditional remedies to promote overall well-being.
